blurb.title: About Me
blurb.line1: I'm a 4th-year Software Engineering student at the University of Ottawa, Canada.
blurb.line2: Over the past decade, I've developed projects ranging from operating systems and debugging tools to AI applications and modern web platforms. I enjoy tackling difficult engineering problems, learning new technologies, and understanding systems from the ground up.
blurb.line3: I'm driven by the opportunity to build software that improves people's lives and contributes to the next generation of technology.

rossvideo.title: Software Developer Coop - Robotics
rossvideo.description: Developed a full-stack robot configuration platform for live video production environments, building an interactive React/PixiJS editing tools and Spring Boot WebSocket services for real-time data synchronization. Improved usability, performance, and scalability across the application.

ised.title: Software and Operations Officer Coop
ised.description: Developed and maintained internal tools and Salesforce applications to support large-scale telecommunications programs. Automated workflows using Java, SQL, VBA, and Salesforce, improving operational efficiency while collaborating with engineering teams and stakeholders to streamline project delivery.

bingo.oneliner: A visual concurrency debugger for Go
bingo.description: An in-progress cross-platform debugger exploring how developers can inspect goroutines, channels, mutexes, and runtime events. The project currently focuses on the low-level debugging engine, communication protocol, and client architecture.

quickcv.oneliner: An optimized real-time object detection pipeline
quickcv.description: Designed a confidence-gated, two-stage YOLOv8 pipeline for CPU vehicle detection. Uncertain detections are selectively escalated to a stronger model, improving difficult predictions without paying the full inference cost on every object.

webserver.oneliner: A lightweight HTTP web server in C++
webserver.description: Implemented socket communication, HTTP request parsing, connection management, and static-file serving in C++ to understand the protocol below the framework layer.

hungryai.description: Co-built a restaurant discovery experience that turns sketches into real-time recommendations, combining a responsive React interface with computer vision and language models.

contact.title: Let's build something interesting.
contact.description: I'm especially interested in full-stack engineering, developer tools, robotics, systems programming, and applied machine learning. If you're working on a difficult engineering problem, I'd love to hear about it.

footer.made: Made with love by Xavier Lermusieaux
